title: Create Auto Track
description: This mod can automatically lay down railways from the Create mod.
body:
This is a simple mod. It can **automatically** lay tracks and allows customization of track types and roadbeds.

Use a Railway Casing and a Lapis Lazuli to craft a Builder Block, then set the destination in the machine GUI, and use a reinforced plate while sneaking to right-click the machine to lay down the railway.

Supports tracks form Create: Steam'n Rails mod.
